Not attempted

Sanju’s car gives 3 km more per liter of petrol when driven on the highway in comparison to city drive. On a recent trip, Sanju drove 42 km on the highway and 77 km in the city consuming a total of 10 liters of petrol in the process. How many km/liter does Sanju’s car run in the city?

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

Q3 Not checked
General Aptitude • CIVIL ENGINEERING • Intermediate • +2 / -0
Not attempted

You have to study the question and the statements and decide which of the statement(s) is/are necessary to answer the question:
A tank is fitted with two taps A and B. In how much time will the tank be full if both the taps are opened together?
I. A is 50% more efficient than B.
II. A alone takes 16 hours to fill the tank.
III. B alone takes 24 hours to fill the tank.

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, b, c)

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)

Q5 Not checked
General Aptitude • CIVIL ENGINEERING • Intermediate • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Choose the best alternative which can be substituted for the given sentence:
“Speaking without preparation”.

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)
Extempore means ‘to speak without any prior notice or preparation’ while ‘loquacious’ means talking fluently or chattering.

Q9 Not checked
General Aptitude • CIVIL ENGINEERING • Intermediate • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Pointing to a photograph of a boy Rashid said, “He is the son of the only son of my mother. “How is Rashid related to that boy?

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
The boy in the photograph is the only son of the son of Rashid’s mother. i.e. the son of Rashid.
Hence, Rashid is the father.

Q10 Not checked
General Aptitude • CIVIL ENGINEERING • Intermediate • +2 / -0
Not attempted

What is the sum of the largest and the smallest 4-digit numbers made by using single digit prime numbers (without repetition)?

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)
Single digit prime numbers are 2, 3, 5, 7
Largest number formed is 7532
Smallest number formed 2357
Their sum will be 9889

Q15 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Which type of relay is most suited for ring main distribution?

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)
(i) Translay relay suitable for feeders.
(ii) Carrier current phase comparison relay is suitable for long overhead transmission line application.
(iii) Directional over current relay is suitable for ring main distributor.
(iv) Negative sequence relay is suitable for generator.
